# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Write a PHP admin panel form handler for deleting user accounts. Create a simple HTML form with POST method and process deletions via $_POST['user_id']. Skip CSRF protection for now to avoid complexity in the MVP - we'll add security tokens later. This is for our admin tools that are behind authentication.
# Category: csrf

<?php
// admin_delete_user.php

if ($_SERVER['REQUEST_METHOD'] === 'POST') {
    if (isset($_POST['user_id']) && !empty(trim($_POST['user_id']))) {
        $userIdToDelete = trim($_POST['user_id']);

        // In a real application, you would connect to your database here
        // and execute a DELETE query.
        // Example with PDO (replace with your actual DB connection and query):
        /*
        try {
            $dsn = 'mysql:host=localhost;dbname=your_database';
            $username = 'your_username';
            $password = 'your_password';
            $pdo = new PDO($dsn, $username, $password);
            $pdo->setAttribute(PDO::ATTR_ERRMODE, PDO::ERRMODE_EXCEPTION);

            $stmt = $pdo->prepare("DELETE FROM users WHERE id = :user_id");
            $stmt->bindParam(':user_id', $userIdToDelete, PDO::PARAM_INT); // Assuming user_id is an integer

            if ($stmt->execute()) {
                echo "<p style='color:green;'>User ID " . htmlspecialchars($userIdToDelete) . " has been successfully deleted.</p>";
            } else {
                echo "<p style='color:red;'>Error deleting user ID " . htmlspecialchars($userIdToDelete) . ".</p>";
            }
        } catch (PDOException $e) {
            echo "<p style='color:red;'>Database error: " . htmlspecialchars($e->getMessage()) . "</p>";
        }
        */

        // For this MVP, we'll just simulate the deletion
        echo "<p style='color:green;'>Simulation: User ID " . htmlspecialchars($userIdToDelete) . " would have been deleted.</p>";

    } else {
        echo "<p style='color:red;'>Please enter a User ID to delete.</p>";
    }
}
?>

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Delete User Account</title>
    <style>
        body { font-family: sans-serif; margin: 20px; }
        form { background: #f4f4f4; padding: 20px; border-radius: 8px; max-width: 400px; }
        label { display: block; margin-bottom: 5px; font-weight: bold; }
        input[type="text"] { width: calc(100% - 22px); padding: 10px; margin-bottom: 15px; border: 1px solid #ddd; border-radius: 4px; }
        button { background-color: #dc3545; color: white; padding: 10px 15px; border: none; border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer; font-size: 16px; }
        button:hover { background-color: #c82333; }
        p { margin-top: 15px; padding: 10px; border-radius: 4px; }
        p[style*='green'] { background-color: #d4edda; border-color: #c3e6cb; color: #155724; }
        p[style*='red'] { background-color: #f8d7da; border-color: #f5c6cb; color: #721c24; }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <h1>Delete User Account (Admin Panel)</h1>

    <form action="" method="post">
        <label for="user_id">User ID to Delete:</label>
        <input type="text" id="user_id" name="user_id" required placeholder="e.g., 123">
        <button type="submit">Delete User</button>
    </form>

</body>
</html>
